case_title: MEAD, CAROLINE VS ZIMMERMAN, MONCIA C/O MYRA (BUILDING MANAGER)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,355.78 FILED BY MEAD, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, MONCIA C/O MYRA (BUILDING MANAGER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFT' REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE REQUESTED:1/26/99 AT 1:30 P.M.
DEFT'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST WITH ORDER VOIDED BY DEFT; DEFT.INSTEAD IS REQUESTING AN AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE FOR 12/22/98 AT 1:30 P.M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-10-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-22-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEAD, CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, MONCIA C/O MYRA (BUILDING MANAGER) $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, MONCIA C/O MYRA (BUILDING MANAGER)
